tailoredSummary: Software engineer with strong TypeScript and React experience, shipping reliable web systems and performance-minded APIs.

bullets.original: Led migration of a billing service to TypeScript with zero customer-facing incidents.
bullets.tailored: Led a customer billing migration to TypeScript in a Next.js-adjacent stack with zero customer-facing incidents.
bullets.changeReason: Surface TypeScript leadership in language closer to the JD without inventing new tools.
